jp.title: ゲームプレイに最高？ 折りたたみiPhone Ultraの新たなモックアップ動画が拡散
jp.description: アップルの折りたたみiPhone（仮称「iPhone Ultra」）のモックアップを、同社の他のデバイスと比較した画像や動画が拡散しています。

jp.title: 「アギトー超能力戦争ー」より仮面ライダーG7、仮面ライダーG3
jp.description: バンダイは、食玩「SO-DO CHRONICLE 仮面ライダーG7 ＆ 仮面ライダーG3-X セット」と「SO-DO CHRONICLE 仮面ライダーG6 セット」を11月に発売する。4月29日13時よりプレミアムバンダイにて予約を開始する予定で、価格は「仮面ライダーG7 ＆ 仮面ライダーG3-X セット」が7,260円、「仮面ライダーG6 セット」が5,995円。

jp.title: ゴールデンウィークは気圧の変動大 特に5月1日頃と4日頃は頭痛やめまいなど注意
jp.description: ゴールデンウィーク中は、気圧が上昇と下降を繰り返します。特に、5月1日頃と4日頃は、広い範囲で下降による影響度が大きくなるでしょう。気圧の変化に敏感な方は、頭痛やめまいなどに十分な注意が必要です。

jp.title: 【直前インフォメーション】J1百年構想リーグ 地域LR-13[H] 鹿島アントラーズ戦のポイント（26.4.29）

world.title: ’A new power’: Trump not invited to climate conference attended by 60 countries
world.description: "When the largest emitters have been present at the COP negotiations, they have pushed for a veto to prevent any discussion of the need to transition beyond fossil fuels," said the conference host.

world.title: Kenya's leader backtracks after comments mocking Nigerians' English
world.description: Kenya's President William Ruto has been forced to respond to the backlash over his recent remarks suggesting Nigerian-accented English was incomprehensible.

world.title: 'The situation is under control,' Mali's junta leader says in first address since weekend attacks
world.description: In his first address to the country since the weekend’s wave of attacks, Mali’s junta leader Assimi Goita said on Tuesday that “the situation is under control.”

world.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Stocks swing, oil edges up with Iran war peace talks stalled
world.description: Follow The Hindu for the latest updates on the Iran-Israel-U.S. war amid the escalating tensions in West Asia.

world.title: Penticton Vees end inaugural Western Hockey League playoffs in heartbreak
world.description: The Penticton Vees are out of the Western Hockey League playoffs, losing their series 4-0 to the Everett Silvertips.

world.title: Quixote scaling back LA stage business operations
world.description: Quixote is scaling back most of its Los Angeles sound stage business, including its main studio in West Hollywood in another to blow to California's business ecosystem.

world.title: Somalia’s ousted Southwest leader Laftagaren plans comeback as federal forces tighten grip on Baidoa
world.description: MOGADISHU (Somaliguardian) - Somalia’s ousted Southwest regional state leader Abdiasis Laftagaren, removed from power last month in a federal military

world.title: High court orders Aliff Syukri to pay RM250,000 in defamation suit
world.description: KUALA LUMPUR: The High Court has ordered cosmetics businessman Datuk Seri Aliff Syukri Kamaruzaman to pay RM250,000 in damages to former minister Tan Sri Abdul Kadir Sheikh Fadzir in a defamation suit.

world.title: Govt orders budget cuts over impact of Iran war
world.description: Treasury says a review of operating expenditures is needed as the subsidy bill is expected to balloon from the initial RM15 billion allocated for 2026 to RM58.4 billion.

world.title: Eggs before omelettes: Dinosaurs already settled the chicken debate 66 million years ago
world.description: For centuries, humanity has wrestled with one of life’s most urgent, civilization-defining questions: “What came first, the chicken or the egg?” Empires have risen and fallen, philosophers have pondered, and somewhere, someone’s uncle has confidently declared at Thanksgiving dinner, “Well obviously, it’s the chicken,” before reaching for more stuffing. But let’s gently – yet decisively […]
